content: Edit: The discussion appears to be mostly at https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/dedicated-calendar-app-for-thunderbird-mobile-lightning-app/idc-p/122017#M63370 which I was directed to by someone so i'll keep the discussion over there from now.👍
creator: matth3wall3n

content:
Hi Mathew

The calendar suggestion below on Mozilla connect may be a better choice to place your feedback and vote on. It's more active and has far greater votes.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/calendar-support-on-thunderbird-mobile/idi-p/76394

The TB team have also made the below comment on their state of the thunder blog.

"For calendar explorations, we’ll determine whether it’s better to integrate with the native Android calendar or build a calendar section for the app."

https://blog.thunderbird.net/2025/12/state-of-the-thunder-14-the-2026-mobile-roadmap/
creator: platform34
